creator: clive@CirX.ORG
text:
Our FreeBSD native isprint couldn't handle Chinese characters very 
	well. Thus we have to explictly set LC_CTYPE=en_US.ISO_8859-1 just
	for tin. I'm tired of telling people at Taiwan to set other environ-
	ment varibles not pointed to zh_TW.Big5 and explain why.

Fix: The diff:
Another temporary quick fix files/patch-misc.c :
How-To-Repeat: 	Apply the diff and cvs add another temporary quick fix.
